projectName: tell me about this new drive p...

messages.text: tell me about this new drive project

The **"New Drive" project** is a strategic initiative focused on reimagining Google Drive folders by deeply integrating AI and collaborative agents to massively boost user productivity. 

### Key Aspects of the Project
* **Core Vision:** The project explores making folders "amazing" and dynamic. This includes investigating how folders can host web apps, how team members can collaborate with proactive AI agents (utilizing shared context and memory), and how to transition to non-location-based groupings like "Projects" [📄 Copy of A New Drive Agenda](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1AkIQ1K7sdnAlL-M3dMp-oHuuSeb2PijCVUVVZPxmfxk).
* **Current Objective:** Address low current AI feature adoption in Drive by creating a simpler, folder-based agent experience. The immediate goal is building a functional prototype connected to real Drive data to secure leadership investment [📄 Copy of A New Drive Agenda](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1AkIQ1K7sdnAlL-M3dMp-oHuuSeb2PijCVUVVZPxmfxk).
* **Design & UX:** Conceptual designs and UI assets are being developed to visualize this new layout and file organization structure [📄 Drive Folder Vision-20260527T132419Z-3-001.zip](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1RiMBMjysBKFjPuPgrVu5iyPTZITsrXm5).

### Technical & Setup Progress
The team is actively setting up the collaborative development environment for their prototype:
* **GCP & AI Studio Integration:** AI Studio is being leveraged for rapid prototyping to automate GCP configurations, such as OAuth client setup and Google Drive API scope definitions [📄 help setting a collab repo for drive - 2026/06/23 14:29 EDT - Notes by Gemini](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1EUaPAdQeUdJUfa9uAqyTBUecmUtW2W_Le999ei93Qf8).
* **Workflow Alignment:** For the upcoming team sprint, the group decided to use a newly documented project flow over deprecated legacy methods to ensure stability. They are currently testing this setup and considering reusing an existing GCP project named "Orchestra" [📄 help setting a collab repo for drive - 2026/06/23 14:29 EDT - Notes by Gemini](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1EUaPAdQeUdJUfa9uAqyTBUecmUtW2W_Le999ei93Qf8).

### Next Steps for the New Drive Project

The immediate priority for the "New Drive" project is finalizing the technical environment for the upcoming team sprint and initiating design-led prototyping.

#### Technical Environment Setup (Daniel Giuditta)
* **GCP Project Configuration:** Set up the Google Cloud project using Nathan's documentation. Evaluate the legacy flow against the new flow to ensure configuration stability for the upcoming workshop [📄 help setting a collab repo for drive - 2026/06/23 14:29 EDT - Notes by Gemini](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1EUaPAdQeUdJUfa9uAqyTBUecmUtW2W_Le999ei93Qf8).
* **OAuth & Scope Management:** Enable required APIs (such as Google Drive) and define precise scopes. Add allowed hosting origins (e.g., `localhost:5173` or Zipline URLs) within the client, and ensure prototype code explicitly requests matching scopes [📄 help setting a collab repo for drive - 2026/06/23 14:29 EDT - Notes by Gemini](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1EUaPAdQeUdJUfa9uAqyTBUecmUtW2W_Le999ei93Qf8).
* **Grant Team Access:** Coordinate with Nathan to add team members as "Owners" in the GCP project settings so they can import the project into their AI Studio instances [📄 help setting a collab repo for drive - 2026/06/23 14:29 EDT - Notes by Gemini](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1EUaPAdQeUdJUfa9uAqyTBUecmUtW2W_Le999ei93Qf8).
* **Status Reporting:** Report the final testing and configuration results to the contact at Joseph Schmidt Confections [📄 help setting a collab repo for drive - 2026/06/23 14:29 EDT - Notes by Gemini](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1EUaPAdQeUdJUfa9uAqyTBUecmUtW2W_Le999ei93Qf8).

#### Strategy & Prototyping (All Team Members)
* **UXR & Inspiration Sharing:** Distribute folder/AI-relevant UXR studies and share external product inspirations in the group chat [📄 Copy of A New Drive Agenda](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1AkIQ1K7sdnAlL-M3dMp-oHuuSeb2PijCVUVVZPxmfxk).
* **Catalogue Baggage:** Document existing technical hurdles that restrict fast feature development in legacy Drive [📄 Copy of A New Drive Agenda](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1AkIQ1K7sdnAlL-M3dMp-oHuuSeb2PijCVUVVZPxmfxk).
* **Individual Prototyping:** Select a core concept (e.g., web apps in folders, agent collaboration models, or non-location-based projects) and build a lightweight prototype to drive upcoming summit discussions [📄 Copy of A New Drive Agenda](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1AkIQ1K7sdnAlL-M3dMp-oHuuSeb2PijCVUVVZPxmfxk).

* [📄 Copy of A New Drive Agenda](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1AkIQ1K7sdnAlL-M3dMp-oHuuSeb2PijCVUVVZPxmfxk)
